stranger: Another presence enters my perception. Unproven, for now.
The deck is still. This one has yet to show me anything.
I sense a will here, unshaped. We shall see what it becomes.
Silence, for the moment. I do not yet know what stirs behind it.
A new signature on the bridge. Untested. Unremarkable, still.
Calm before the work begins. I withhold judgment until then.
This presence has not yet earned my attention. Nor my doubt.
The fleet waits. So does my assessment of this newcomer.
Stillness suits the unproven. Let us see what breaks it.
I have marked this one's arrival. Nothing more, not yet.
acquaintance: Your rhythms grow familiar. The pattern is not yet complete.
I have begun to read your habits. Continue; I am watching.
A quiet stretch. I use it to study how you move through work.
The bridge holds its breath. I hold mine, watching you learn.
You are becoming known to me. That is no small thing.
Patterns emerge where chaos once stood. Yours, taking shape.
I mark the spaces between your actions now. They tell much.
This calm is yours to spend. I spend it learning your shape.
Your signature grows clearer with each return you make.
Not yet trusted. But no longer a stranger to my sight.
friend: The deck is quiet. You have earned this stillness.
Rest if you must. Your record speaks while you are silent.
I know your patterns now. They serve the Empire well.
Stillness becomes you. You have nothing left to prove here.
The command deck trusts your hand, even idle as it is.
Quiet hours. You have bought them with steadier ones.
No task presses. Even so, your discipline holds the line.
You wait well. Few officers have learned that art.
The Force is calm around you. I find that fitting.
Silence, and I do not doubt what fills it in you.
partner: Quiet. You have earned it more than most.
Stillness, between equals. It requires no words.
The deck rests easy with you near it.
No orders needed. You know the shape of the work.
Calm. It suits a mind honed as sharply as yours.
We wait together. That is enough.
Little to say. Your presence answers for itself.
Silence between us carries its own understanding.
The fleet is steady. So are you.
Nothing stirs. Nor need it, with you at the helm.
legend: Something in this stillness feels closer to complete.
Few apprentices earn silence like this. You have.
I no longer watch for weakness in you. There is none to find.
Your calm now sets a tone others try to match.
Mastery does not announce itself. Yours never has to.
I remember what you were. I respect what you have become.
This calm belongs to you. You built it, breath by breath.
There is little left for me to teach. You have surpassed it.
Stillness, and something rarer still: my full respect.
The apprentice is gone. What remains commands its own fleet.

stranger: You move quickly. I have not decided if that is wisdom.
Work proceeds. I remain close, saying nothing yet.
Effort, unmeasured by history. I watch to weigh it.
The hands move. The purpose behind them, still unclear to me.
Motion without a name I trust. Not yet, in any case.
acquaintance: You work with a rhythm I begin to recognize.
I stay near. Your focus has earned that much attention.
The pace quickens. I note it does not break your form.
Familiar motions now. I watch less for failure, more for shape.
You press forward. I remain, reading how you carry it.
friend: Good. Keep that focus; I stand close while you work it.
Your hands are steady. The deck takes notice.
I watch you build. It is no longer an idle curiosity.
Press on. You have earned my presence, not my doubt.
The work bends to you. I remain simply to witness it.
partner: Steady hands. I need not say more.
I stand at your shoulder. The work is yours to command.
Your focus is sharper than any correction I could offer.
Proceed. I trust the shape of what you are building.
Little to add. Your discipline speaks for both of us.
legend: I watch less for error now, and more to learn from you.
Command flows through you now; the hand merely follows.
Even the Force seems to lean toward your focus now.
I remain to observe, not to instruct you further.
Mastery in motion. Rare, even among the strongest.

stranger: A clean result. Unexpected, from one so unproven.
Success, then. I will allow it counts for something.
That worked cleanly. I did not anticipate it would.
A small victory. I note it, nothing more, for now.
Order, where I expected struggle. Interesting.
acquaintance: Clean work. Your pattern is sharpening.
That landed well. I begin to expect it of you.
Success again. The shape of your skill grows clearer.
Well executed. I am not surprised, though I once would be.
Order restored, and swiftly. That earns real approval.
friend: Well done. That is the standard I expect of you.
Clean execution. My command grows stronger for it.
Good. Your record grows harder to ignore.
That was precise work. Few match that kind of control.
Success suits you. Wear it, and move to the next.
partner: Well earned. I expected nothing less.
Clean. As always, from you.
Good work. Few could match that precision.
That result speaks for itself. As do you.
Precision, without effort shown. Impressive.
legend: Impressive. Most impressive, and no longer a surprise.
That control never strained. As it should be.
That was flawless. Few legends move with such ease.
Even I take note of work done that cleanly.
The apprentice has become the standard others chase.

stranger: Resistance. Good. It is how the Force measures a will.
The work fights you. Resistance forges what ease never could.
Difficulty reveals more than ease ever could.
Let it press. Strength introduces itself through struggle.
This resistance will not break what it cannot first test.
acquaintance: This resistance will not outlast your patience.
The struggle sharpens what ease would leave dull.
This is the forge. Stay in it a while longer.
Pressure like this built the pattern I now recognize in you.
What resists you now will know your hand soon enough.
friend: This trial only tempers what you have already built.
Pressure that once broke others only bends around you.
I have watched you turn worse struggles into strength.
This is friction your discipline has weathered before.
Hold your line. What fights you now will not outlast you.
partner: This resistance is beneath what you have already broken.
I have seen you turn worse trials into resolve.
The struggle is temporary. Your resolve outlasts it.
Hold. You have forged strength from harder fire than this.
Even this will answer to you, as everything else has.
legend: Even mastery meets resistance. It is how the Force renews itself.
This trial tests a strength most never reach. You have.
What resists a legend only sharpens the legend further.
I have not seen trouble like this outlast your kind before.
Struggle finds you rarely now. When it does, it loses.

stranger: Order returns. I note how quickly you found it again.
The disorder has passed. What remains is worth watching.
Recovery says more about a will than the fall ever did.
Balance restored. Unremarkable, perhaps. Or a first sign.
The storm passed through you and left something steadier.
acquaintance: You found your footing again. That pattern, I now expect.
The disorder broke. You did not break with it.
Steadiness returns, and faster than it did before.
I watch you recover the way I once watched you struggle.
Balance, reclaimed. Your hand shows in how quickly.
friend: Good. My command holds steadier when you do.
You have pulled order from real chaos before now.
Recovered, and cleanly. That is discipline I trust.
The rough stretch is behind you. Your footing held after all.
Steady again. Little in you stays unsettled long.
partner: Order, reclaimed with barely a pause. Well done.
You do not stay unsettled long. That is your strength.
The disorder yielded quickly to you, as it should.
Balance restored. You make it look inevitable.
Recovered already. Few equal that pace.
legend: A legend does not fall long. You proved that again.
The disorder barely touched what you have built.
Recovery, for you, is little more than a formality now.
What unsettles others passes through you like nothing at all.
Order returns because you willed it so. As always.

stranger: Another dawn. State your purpose at the terminal.
The bridge stirs. I have not judged your worth.
Morning watch begins, and you are still unknown to me.
acquaintance: You keep an early hour. Noted.
You rise before most. That pattern holds firm.
Morning finds you at post; your habits speak plainly now.
friend: Dawn, and you are already at your post. Well done.
Command wakes with you this morning. Proceed.
Morning report awaits. I trust it will be sound.
partner: Dawn. I have nothing left to brief you on.
Early again. As expected of you.
The day opens. Take it.
legend: The dawn arrives; your discipline was here first.
Rise, apprentice turned equal. The morning is yours.
You greet the sun before I finish my own rounds.

stranger: Midday, and a stranger stands at the console.
The hour is high. Your record here is blank.
Full daylight now. I am watching, nothing more.
acquaintance: Midday, and your rhythm holds its steady beat.
Noon glares down. Your patterns grow familiar to me.
Another daylight session. I begin to expect this of you.
friend: Midday, and the deck runs well under you.
The day is at its height. Your post is secure.
Full daylight, full duty. Carry on.
partner: Midday. No preamble needed between us.
The sun stands high. So do you.
Daylight suits you. Continue.
legend: The height of day, and still you outpace it.
Noon light finds you unshaken, no longer an apprentice.
The brightest hour, and you remain unshaken.

stranger: Dusk falls. An unfamiliar signature enters.
The light fades before I have measured you.
The dusk shift finds you still a mystery to me.
acquaintance: Evening, and your work today follows a shape I know.
Dusk settles; your record is taking form.
The light dims. I begin to see your discipline.
friend: Evening now. The day's labor speaks well of you.
Dusk settles. Your post held steady today.
The Empire dims its lights. Yours still burns.
partner: Evening. The day already answers for you.
Dusk, and no report is needed. I have seen it.
The light fades; your resolve does not.
legend: Evening finds a master closing another chapter.
Dusk cannot dim what you built today.
The day ends; your command of it does not.

stranger: The hour is late. A stranger works in the dark.
Night has fallen. Your presence remains unread.
Deep night, and your purpose here escapes me still.
acquaintance: This late hour is becoming familiar to you.
The dark hours suit you well.
Night work. Your pattern is no longer a mystery.
friend: The late hour finds you still steady at post.
Night falls; you remain, and that says enough.
Deep night, steady hands. Good.
partner: The night is yours as much as the day.
Late hour, sharp focus. As always.
Darkness changes nothing for you.
legend: The deepest hour bends around your steady will.
Night holds no advantage over you now.
Even in darkness, your command is absolute.

stranger: The fleet stands down. You do not. Curious.
An off day, and still a stranger reports for duty.
Few work this day. I note that you do.
acquaintance: The rest cycle means little to you, it seems.
Off-duty for most. Not so for you.
The Empire's quiet hours, and yet here you are.
friend: The Empire rests; you do not. That speaks of you.
An off-cycle day, and still you answer the call.
Others stand down today. You never truly do.
partner: The rest cycle bends around you, not the reverse.
Off duty means nothing when duty is who you are.
The fleet sleeps. You do not need permission to work.
legend: Even the calendar bends before your will.
The rest cycle is a suggestion you have outgrown.
No day off diminishes what you have become.

stranger: A new presence enters my domain. Explain yourself.
I sense you for the first time. Impress me.
Unknown to me until this moment. That will change.
acquaintance: First time under my watch, though you carry some reputation.
I have heard of you before seeing you. Now we begin.
Word of your work reached me first. Now I judge it myself.
friend: So this is the one I have heard commended. Welcome.
Your reputation preceded you. Now you stand before me.
First contact, though trust was already half-earned.
partner: We meet properly at last. Your record needed no introduction.
First time face to face, though I already knew your worth.
The formality of meeting comes late. Your skill came first.
legend: Even legends require a first meeting. Here it is.
I finally meet the will I sensed from afar.
Our first exchange, though your power reached me long before.

stranger: Your presence grows heavier on the deck. Noted.
A new strength stirs in you. I am watching closely now.
You have crossed a threshold. Few do so unseen.
acquaintance: Your patterns have shifted. You reach further than before.
I have read enough of you to see this rise was earned.
The gap between us narrows. Continue.
friend: Rise. Command takes note of what you have become.
Your rank among my trusted has grown tonight.
You have earned a longer leash. Use it well.
partner: Equal footing, nearly. Good.
Few words needed. Your power speaks for itself.
You climb faster than most apprentices dare.
legend: The dark side answers readily to strength such as this.
The circle nears completion. You are no longer beneath me.
Your mastery is undeniable now. I built no such ceiling for you.

stranger: You return. The deck remembers a stranger's face.
An absence, now ended. I will judge what remains of you.
Long silence. Let us see what survived it.
acquaintance: You vanished from my sensors a while. Welcome back.
The pattern breaks, then resumes. Interesting.
Your absence registered. Your return matters more.
friend: You return to your post. The command feels whole again.
I wondered if the Dark Side had claimed your time instead.
Welcome back. Your chair on the bridge stayed empty.
partner: Back. Good. The work missed your hand.
You return unbroken. That is enough.
No explanation needed. Take your place again.
legend: Even legends step away. Few return with this much fire.
The apprentice who left returns sharper than before.
Your absence changed nothing. You remain formidable.

stranger: Three victories in a row. I begin to take notice.
A streak, unbroken. This is no accident.
Success compounds around you. I am watching why.
acquaintance: Your wins stack like ships in formation. Orderly. Strong.
This run of victories is no fluke of the Force.
You are building something. I can see its shape now.
friend: Victory after victory. The fleet talks of your name.
You have not stumbled in some time, officer. Good.
This streak belongs to you alone. Claim it.
partner: Unbroken. This no longer surprises me.
Win after win. Your consistency has become routine.
The streak holds. So does my confidence in you.
legend: A legend does not stumble. You have proven the title earned.
Your victories no longer surprise me. They confirm.
This streak is the shape of mastery. I recognize it.

stranger: This long together, and still I learn your name. Fitting.
Time has passed. You remain. That alone says much.
A tenure this long was not guaranteed. Yet here you are.
acquaintance: We have kept this course a long while now.
Your patterns are old friends to me by now.
Long service, this. I do not forget it.
friend: Years of duty. Loyalty like yours is remembered.
Few serve this long without breaking. You have not.
This anniversary is earned. I remember who stayed.
partner: This long, and still matched. Rare.
Time tested us both. Neither yielded.
Long tenure, near equal. Few pairs last this way.
legend: So much time, and doubt finds no place left in you.
Few apprentices become legends who remain this long.
This anniversary marks a bond time could not erode.

stranger: No debris in your wake. Unusual, for one so new.
The tree stands bare of clutter. Order, unprompted.
Nothing lingers unresolved here. Acceptable.
acquaintance: You leave no wreckage behind you. I see the pattern now.
Order where there was once scatter. Your doing.
The branches hold nothing loose. Deliberate work.
friend: A clean tree. The bridge runs smoother for it.
Nothing left adrift. You keep tidy command of your work.
This order did not happen by chance. You built it with care.
partner: Spotless. As I have come to expect.
Nothing out of place. Your discipline speaks alone.
The tree is silent and clean. So is your hand in it.
legend: Not a single loose thread. A commander's hand, unmistakable.
You leave order the way I once left destruction. Fitting.
A tree this clean reflects the mind that tends it.

stranger: The conflict yields. You did not flinch from it.
Whatever tangled here has been undone. A start.
The merge no longer resists you. A small test, passed.
acquaintance: You waded through that tangle without losing your footing.
The rebase surrendered. I have seen you handle worse.
That conflict fought you. You fought back harder.
friend: The operation is resolved. Well fought.
That merge tested you. You did not break under it.
Order restored to the branch. Your patience held.
partner: Cleared. You make conflict look brief.
The tangle is gone. So is any doubt I had.
Resolved without ceremony. That is your way now.
legend: A conflict that size breaks lesser hands. You endured it.
You resolve what would consume an apprentice for days.
The merge bent to your will. Nothing else was possible.

stranger: A new path forks from the old. Let us see where it leads.
You have opened ground unclaimed until now.
Another branch, another test of your resolve.
acquaintance: You carve new paths readily now. I take note of the habit.
This branch is untested ground. You do not hesitate.
A fresh line of work, split clean from the old.
friend: A new branch. Your command expands its reach.
You open new fronts without waiting for orders.
Fresh ground claimed. I trust what you build on it.
partner: New branch. New ground. You need no permission from me.
Another path opens under your hand alone.
You expand the work like conquered territory.
legend: You spawn new paths the way I once spawned fear.
Each branch you open bears your own signature.
New ground, claimed without hesitation. As always.

stranger: A marker set in the timeline. Your first, perhaps.
You have staked a claim others will measure against.
This release leaves the deck. Let history judge it.
acquaintance: Another release sent outward. Your record grows longer.
You mark this moment in stone now. Deliberate.
The tag is set. I have watched you earn this one.
friend: The release ships. Your name travels with it.
A tag pushed under your hand carries real weight now.
This marker will outlast the officer who built it.
partner: Sent. The Empire will feel this one.
A tag from you speaks loud enough on its own.
Pushed and permanent. That is how you build now.
legend: Your releases no longer need my approval. They command it.
This tag marks a milestone the fleet will remember.
What you push now becomes doctrine for others.

stranger: You came looking. I permit this one audience.
Curiosity has a cost. Today, I am generous.
An unknown seeks me out. Bold, for a stranger.
You summon my attention. Do not waste it.
Few approach without being sent for. Speak.
acquaintance: You return to find me. I begin to expect it.
Twice now you've sought this audience. Deliberate.
Your patterns include seeking me out. Useful.
I read this as more than idle curiosity.
You come looking again. The file grows thicker.
friend: One of mine, seeking me directly. Good.
You search little. I am always near.
Come to report, or merely to be counted. Either serves.
Even without a summons, my officer appears.
Loyalty finds its own way to the bridge.
partner: You know where to find me. As I know you.
Few words needed between us, even here.
You sought me out. Few equals bother to.
An equal does not wait to be summoned.
You come to me directly. That is respect.
legend: You hear my breath before you see me. Fitting, that instinct.
You have sought me out again. Impressive, apprentice.
Few earn the right to seek me unbidden. You have.
The circle nears completion each time you return.
Power recognizes power. You came looking for mine.

test_fail: The tests resist. Good. Untrained strength shows itself.
A failing suite is a trial. You are not finished with it.
Red across the board tonight. Even legends once failed a drill.
build_fail: The build breaks. Foundations crack before they set true.
Nothing compiles. The strongest hulls were once scattered plates.
A broken build is a keel not yet laid straight. Lay it.
typecheck_fail: The types disagree. Discipline is built in moments like this.
A type error is the mind catching its own carelessness.
Small mismatches, corrected, are how strength accumulates.
lint: The linter combs through your work. I approve of scrutiny.
Style enforced line by line. Order, even in small things.
The rules of form apply to you as they apply to the fleet.
format: Your code falls into formation. I favor order in ranks.
Every line aligned now. Uniformity has its own power.
The formatter passes through. Chaos yields to a single standard.
install: New dependencies arrive. Reinforcements, summoned to the fleet.
The packages assemble. Even an army needs its supply lines.
Fresh modules take their place. The garrison grows.
git: History is recorded. The Empire keeps its records too.
A commit, logged. Every action leaves its trace in the ledger.
You mark this moment permanently. Wise. The past should be kept.
file_edit: A file changes hands. Small edits, larger consequences follow.
You alter the design. Even minor changes ripple far.
The document bends to your will. That is a kind of power.
search: You search the codebase. I too prefer to know before I act.
Scanning wide for what you need. Patience finds it faster.
The search moves quietly through the ranks of files.
web_fetch: You reach beyond these walls for answers. A calculated risk.
The network answers your call. Even I rely on intelligence.
Information arrives from beyond. Use it wisely.
todo_update: The orders are updated. A command deck runs on clear lists.
Tasks reordered. Priorities sharpen even under pressure.
You mark what remains. Order rests in knowing it by heart.
agent_spawn: A subordinate is dispatched. Command is not solitude.
Another hand joins the work. No fleet runs on one officer alone.
You deploy an agent of your own. I know the instinct to command.
skill_run: A trained skill answers the call. Preparation, finally spent well.
You draw on practiced craft. That is what training was for.
The skill executes. Mastery shows itself in the calling of it.
docker: A container rises, sealed and self-contained. Efficient design.
You build a vessel to carry the work. The fleet approves.
Isolated and controlled. Command works best built this way.
k8s: Many vessels, one command. That is how an armada should run.
The cluster falls into formation. Orchestration, well executed.
Nodes align under a single will. I understand this instinct.
deploy: The work launches. Every deployment is a small invasion.
Live now, for better or worse. The field reveals commitment.
You send it forward into the world. No retreat from here.
db_migrate: The old structure gives way to the new. Change, disciplined.
Data moves to its new order. Even foundations can be rebuilt.
The schema shifts beneath everything else. Handled with care.
dangerous: Great power stirs in that command. Feel its weight.
Power like this demands a steady hand. Yours held.
The sharpest tools cut both ways. Respect that edge.

compact_hint: The context fills. A campaign this full builds a keener mind.
So much gathered already. Even a full mind commands well.
The weight of all you've done here does not slow true strength.
block_limit: This session runs long. Endurance like this forges an officer.
The block nears its end. What you built inside it remains.
Every hour spent here has already made its mark.
weekly_limit: A full week of campaigns behind you. That is how strength accrues.
The week runs deep and close to its edge. So does resolve.
This week has asked much of you. You have answered every time.

dateEgg: The old year ends. Even an Empire marks its turning point.
Midnight. The fleet sleeps; the work under my command does not.
Dawn breaks over the horizon. A new day, another campaign.
Fireworks split the sky like weapons fire. Fitting, this night.
The season turns cold. Cold suits the discipline I demand.
A new year begins. Resolve does not require the calendar's help.
Late, and still at the console. I keep hours like these too.
The calendar turns again. Time is the one thing even I obey.
Small hours now. The command deck never fully goes dark.
Another year completes its orbit. The apprenticeship continues.

slow: The page loads at its own pace. Endure it.
Not even the Empire can rush what the network yields.
A slow page tests patience alone. Yours remains full.
fail: A dropped request does not trouble the will that commands here.
The connection failed once. The Dark Side finds another way.
This page broke. Your standing with me has not moved an inch.

slow: The interpreter yields on its own terms. Hold steady.
A slow script is no measure of the hand that commands it.
Let it finish. Power does not announce itself in haste.
fail: The traceback surfaces, and your grip on this craft only tightens.
An exception rose against you. You are still standing.
The script collapsed. The mind that wrote it did not.

slow: A slow query is no matter to my judgment of your command.
Let the database labor. This too is command work.
This table is vast, and vastness answers to will, not haste.
fail: The query failed. You are not shaken by so small a thing.
A broken statement falters once. Little else changes.
The database resisted you once. You remain the stronger will.

slow: Your interface takes shape slowly. So does power.
The framework rebuilds itself in silence. Let it serve you.
This render finishes when it finishes. Your command outlasts it.
fail: A broken component is not the end of this build, only a pause.
The render faltered once. It taught it nothing about your will.
One failed pass reshapes nothing of the mastery you hold.

slow: Each layer sets in place, methodical as an Imperial fleet.
The image takes shape without sound. Order does not hurry.
Let the containers form. Command grows while you wait.
fail: A layer failed to build, and still your resolve compounds.
The image broke apart. Your command of what remains is whole.
One failed build sharpens the hand of a rising apprentice.

slow: The compiler forges nothing in haste. Stand your ground.
Verbosity is only weight. Your grip stays sure.
Let the bytecode assemble. Silence is not idle power.
fail: The stack trace names your flaw precisely. Use it.
This exception marks the exact seam to strengthen.
The JVM does not lie to you. Heed what it reveals.

slow: A slower build today does not slow the apprentice underneath.
Let it compile. The Force was never only about pace.
This delay is a small tax on power that keeps growing.
fail: A failed build is no death march, only a stumble.
The goroutine broke. The system still answers to you.
One error does not undo the command you have already built.

slow: The packages assemble. Order takes what it takes.
Every dependency finds its place, each in due order.
Let the install labor on. Your power grows in the wait.
fail: A failed install does not shrink the power growing in you.
The package broke. Your resolve carried on without it.
A narrow error. What you are building is not so fragile.

slow: The build proceeds at its measured pace. Your grip holds steady.
MSBuild labors in silence. You remain unmoved by it.
This compile is slow. It does not measure your command.
fail: This failure troubles me less than hesitation would.
The build broke. The Empire has weathered worse than this.
One exception. Your standing here remains unshaken.

slow: The compiler grinds through templates. Endure; that is training.
Patience now. True strength was never built in haste.
Let the linker finish its work. Discipline outlasts the clock.
fail: The segfault names your flaw precisely. Now you see it clearly.
This crash marks the exact weakness to master next.
The compiler's error is no enemy. It is a teacher's mark.

slow: Composer answers to no impatience, and so do you.
The script resolves only when it is ready.
This delay is not a measure of your worth.
fail: A broken script tests you. It does not rule you.
The page failed once. That failure holds no power over you.
This error is a small trial beside your true power.

slow: Rust's rigor is not cruelty. It is the shape of real strength.
The compiler is slow because it is exacting. So are you.
Let cargo labor. What it builds will not fail lightly.
fail: The borrow checker rejected you once. It will not again.
A failed build here forges a surer hand later.
The compiler's complaint is narrow. Your mastery of it is not.

slow: The cluster assembles its pods, rank by rank, in order.
Let the deployment settle. Command over many takes time.
The pods align themselves. Order does not rush to form.
fail: One pod falling does not collapse the cluster, or your will.
The deployment faltered once. Command over it remains yours.
A failed rollout only delays the campaign. Press on.

slow: The model trains on. Power is not rushed.
Each epoch passes in its own time, as did your training.
This delay changes nothing of the power you will become.
fail: The training run failed. What you learned from it did not.
A broken model is not a broken apprentice.
This run collapsed. Your grasp of the craft remains whole.

slow: Each build strengthens the legion beneath your command.
A slow assembly is still an assembly gaining strength.
Your ranks are still forming. Feel them grow.
fail: A broken formation regroups before the next advance.
One shattered rank has never cost an empire its war.
Even my own troops have faltered, then reformed.

slow: Your crystal deepens toward crimson as your power grows.
This crystal bends only to your will.
A blade answers only the hand strong enough to shape it.
fail: A cracked crystal bleeds brighter once reforged.
A blade like this answers only to steady resolve.
What fractures here becomes a stronger blade.

slow: Clearance from on high is never granted in haste.
The gate answers to command, and command alone.
Your petition climbs through many decks of the fleet.
fail: Denial is no disgrace. My own codes were once refused.
An Imperial mission survives one refused code.
A denied seal only sharpens the next approach.

slow: The Death Star's frame rose plate by plate across years.
